Config Schema Integrity.Python Configuration.Should have strict versioning enabled
Config Schema Integrity.NVIDIA Configuration.Should have preferred cu128

Config Schema Integrity.Requirements Section.Should specify MinPsVer

Nvidia Module.Driver Version Mapping.Should map driver 545-559 to cu121
